name: front-clone-coding
description: Browser-driven site mirroring with API capture, mock data, and backend handoff scaffolding.

scripts.docker:rebuild: docker compose build --pull --no-cache && docker compose up -d --force-recreate
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose down --rmi all && docker image prune -af && docker compose build --pull --no-cache && docker compose up -d --force-recreate
